name: Mechanics 1
description: Comprehensive video lectures on Mechanics 1 covering statics, force systems, and equilibrium, presented by Dr. Waleed El-Saeed Al-Bashbishi.

name: Algebra
description: Video lectures covering fundamental algebraic structures, matrices, and determinants, presented by Dr. Reda Abd.

name: Calculus
description: In-depth video lessons on differential calculus, limits, and continuity, presented by Dr. Reda Abd.

name: Physics 1
description: Lecture slides for Physics 1 covering mechanics and properties of matter, prepared by Dr. Marwa.

name: Language
description: Study materials for the technical language course, focusing on terminology and reading comprehension.

name: Engineering Drawing
description: Resources and exercises for Engineering Drawing, covering orthographic projection and isometric views.

name: English 2
description: Course materials for English 2, enhancing technical writing and communication skills.

name: Mathematics 2
description: Part 1 of Mathematics 2 course materials, covering advanced calculus and integration techniques.

name: General Science
description: Various course materials and lectures provided by Dr. Ahmed Shaban covering fundamental scientific concepts.

name: Operating Systems
description: Study of operating system concepts including processes, memory management, and file systems. Taught by Dr. Asmaa Hamdy.

name: Digital Communication Systems
description: Fundamentals of digital communication systems, modulation techniques, and error detection. Taught by Dr. Hala.

name: Microprocessor
description: Introduction to microprocessor architecture, assembly language, and interfacing. Taught by Dr. Safan.

name: Networks
description: Overview of computer networks, protocols, and architecture. Taught by Dr. Sabry.

name: Waveguides and Antennas
description: Analysis and design of electromagnetic waveguides and antenna systems. Taught by Dr. Mohamed Gamal.

name: Software Engineering
description: Principles of software engineering, development life cycles, and project management. Taught by Dr. Sarah Ayad.

name: Electromagnetic Fields
description: Study of static and time-varying electromagnetic fields and Maxwell's equations. Taught by Dr. Mohamed Gamal.

name: Computer Graphics
description: Introduction to computer graphics algorithms and rendering techniques. Taught by Dr. Arwa.

name: Computer Graphics
description: Advanced topics in computer graphics and visualization. Taught by Dr. Samah.

name: Distributed Systems
description: Design and implementation of distributed software systems and algorithms. Taught by Dr. Nahla Bishri.

name: Embedded Systems
description: Design of embedded systems using microcontrollers and real-time operating systems. Taught by Dr. Mohamed Kamal.

name: Programming Techniques
description: Advanced programming paradigms, algorithms, and problem-solving techniques. Taught by Dr. Noha.

name: Mobile Computing
description: Development of applications for mobile devices and wireless communication protocols. Taught by Dr. Eman.

name: Programmable Logic Controllers
description: Industrial automation and control systems using Programmable Logic Controllers (PLC). Taught by Dr. Mohamed Moawad.

name: Artificial Intelligence
description: Introduction to AI concepts, machine learning, and neural networks. Taught by Dr. Mohamed Kamal.

name: Selected Topics (CS)
description: Special topics in Computer Science covering emerging technologies and trends. Taught by Dr. Sarah Ayad.

name: Project Management
description: Fundamentals of project management, planning, scheduling, and risk analysis. Taught by Dr. Abdelmonem Fouda.

name: Marketing
description: Principles of marketing, market research, and consumer behavior. Taught by Dr. Abdelaziz Ali Hassan.
